title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Conducted deep research on optimizing T-Mobile 5G Home Internet and TP-Link Deco mesh systems. Diagnosed...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Conducted deep research on optimizing T-Mobile 5G Home Internet and TP-Link Deco mesh systems. Diagnosed that the user's Tailscale connection is running via the Miami ('mia') DERP relay, causing VNC lag. Created a comprehensive guide to resolve this via Deco AP mode, native IPv6 enablement, and Wi-Fi interference removal.
